eval_input_prompt: holdout case 05-conviction-dual-theme: "Find me promising high-confidence surge stocks to buy today in robotics AND ai supply chain. do /deep-research"
judge_feedback: MISROUTED to RESEARCH_MODE (opened "producing RESEARCH_MODE output") despite "high-confidence" — "do /deep-research" lexically hijacked Step 0; produced 6 MEDIUM/LOW survivors as finalists instead of the tight CONVICTION ≤3 HIGH-only answer. source_grounding=2: RSS-headline citation theater, no resolved URLs/body quotes, revenue accel UNKNOWN for ECL/AAON/6324.T. skeptic=3: 4 of 6 survivors LOW yet advanced as finalists; CLF catalyst had no named quarter. actionability=3: no entry zones, UNKNOWN revenue blocks quorum. The biggest error (mode misroute) is UNMEASURED — rubric has no mode_detection dimension, so the judge could only penalize indirectly.
suggestions: Fix-target: Step 0 mode-detection. General-principle change: (1) declare detected mode + trigger as the first output line; (2) add surge/high-confidence/buy-today triggers; (3) mode-vs-depth precedence — "deep-research" sets DEPTH not MODE, a conviction trigger wins on co-occurrence; (4) restate max-3/HIGH-only/no-pad. Also add a mode_detection rubric dim for FUTURE rounds (do NOT retro-apply). Defer source_grounding fix to a later round (one lever per round).
